Title: Leadership Readiness
Description: Evaluate your current leadership behaviours and identify the areas to develop as you move into or grow within a leadership role.
SchemaJson: {"id":"leadership_readiness_v1","title":"Leadership Readiness","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"Which best describes your current leadership experience?","options":["No direct leadership experience yet","I informally lead projects or peers","I manage one or two people","I manage a small team","I lead multiple teams or a department"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How comfortable are you giving direct, constructive feedback to others?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"rating","label":"How confident are you in delegating tasks and trusting others to deliver?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"choice","label":"Which leadership skill do you most want to strengthen?","options":["Having difficult conversations","Strategic thinking and vision","Motivating and developing others","Decision-making under uncertainty","Managing upwards and influencing stakeholders"],"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What do you believe is your biggest leadership development area right now?","required":false}]}
